SourceCrate Unique Artifact

Mapped statServer-side

Stats

StatEffectBuild focusUpgradeable
Server-generated artifact instanceThe downloaded client cache does not expose a fixed stat type or value for this sprite.unconfirmedNo, when the received stat is one of ArtifactStat.isUnique

Bosses

BossArtifact drop rows
The CleanerArtifact 100% x6-10 @ 100%

Where It Comes From

SourceNotes
SpriteAtlas image 325985EA-AC38-498D-E6F7-AC61DE1F80F3 / artifact_unique_cleaner
CrateCrate Unique Artifact: crate 99.8%, artifact 99.9%
How it shows upUnique artifacts are spawned from the server and resolved when the item is picked up.
Stat ruleNo fixed stat row is present in the downloaded client cache.
Boss linkThe boss name matches the artifact and the boss has drop rows.
Combat readNo stable combat focus exposed in the downloaded client cache.
